title: Galaxy Under Chaos - A Star Wars Experience
description: "Galaxy Under Chaos" is a Minecraft Star Wars mod where players explore a galaxy in turmoil. Discover unique planets and powerful technology. Customize lightsabers, face new mobs, and navigate an ever-changing universe full of chaos and mystery.
body:
Galaxy Under Chaos

Galaxy Under Chaos is a sci-fi Minecraft mod that takes players on an intergalactic adventure through a galaxy in turmoil. The mod introduces iconic-inspired planets such as Mustafar, Ilum, Ossus, Malachor, Tython, and Naboo, each featuring unique biomes, environments, and resources. Players can explore volcanic worlds, ancient ruins, and lush ecosystems while uncovering hidden secrets across the stars.

Using advanced technology and rare materials like titanium and chromium, players can craft customizable energy-based weapons, powerful tools, and futuristic equipment. The mod also introduces new mobs, energy systems, and space-age structures, allowing for expansive gameplay and creativity. As conflict spreads across the galaxy, players are placed in a dynamic universe filled with danger, discovery, and mystery.

Whether battling hostile forces on desolate planets or harnessing mysterious energy on ancient worlds, Galaxy Under Chaos delivers an immersive experience where players shape their own destiny in a universe on the brink of chaos.

Credits:
This project includes assets from Advanced Lightsabers, originally created by Fisk and contributors.
Assets are used in accordance with their original license. 

Disclaimer:
This project is a fan-made mod inspired by science fiction themes. It is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or associated with Lucasfilm Ltd. or The Walt Disney Company. Star Wars and all related names, characters, and assets are the property of their respective owners. This mod does not include or distribute any official copyrighted material.
